textByHashes.85bda83bb08f8344bde4cbeb6f53177002365974: Hello there. What are you doing here?
textByHashes.5ed5a8e400c62546b805877484d08f908f6a35e4: A good goal to work towards, and it should prove rewarding for you. So where are you starting your studies?
textByHashes.ef2dcda7de40e96274c6349b4bf4fbdb851219d5: Well, you could try looking in the Earth Sciences section of the shelves over there, although the other students may have beaten you to it.
textByHashes.96960ee01428a563529e59e75804e239b8523eee: You could even ask the students themselves. I'm sure I saw a group of them on their way to the digsite earlier today.
textByHashes.734b99e566271cc9803d0921afb2c30420b51df1: If you need something identified or are not sure about something, give it to Terry; he's the archaeological expert in the next room.
textByHashes.ca3081b36c91d208ddc21cbcbcc50200826addad: Of course! Let's see now... Rock picks are for splitting rocks or scraping away soil; you can get one from a cupboard in the Education Centre.
textByHashes.bbfe67e76812f7a5e75a0d78bd8aa01878e2c1c3: I think you'll find them scattered about pretty much everywhere, but I know you can get one from a cupboard somewhere in the Education Centre, just like the rock pick!
textByHashes.a22e26ccc1f708f633198b986c13746ad73a9d7a: We have a bit of a shortage of those at the moment. You could try borrowing one from a workman on the site... but I don't think they'd give it willingly.
textByHashes.1f8a016b2b4fe74e58cac476e9eda765a602e7dd: Ahh... that you must earn by passing your exams! The examiner holds those.
textByHashes.c4504c943cf25efb7cdf936568c2f8380d69d6fa: Oh, hello there. Congratulations on passing your first exam, I saw your performance, well done. Are you going to go for the next level?
textByHashes.66a4e77b85affc4e2e3f05f2a20de9b7f500dc14: Well done! Are you planning on going for level 3?
textByHashes.07393898b4f788d63abfca1761768b6010f708c9: Bravo! Well done indeed! What are your plans now?
textByHashes.d4e3461107f38eee3fd55b397a550330756d85bd: I hear that the third level digs yield the best artefacts for display; Terry, the archaeological expert, has found many good things there that he's excited about.
textByHashes.a104e6119debab2e25b0bc9e55e16b48d8ebd597: I hear you've been given access to the private mining shafts. You're very lucky.
textByHashes.c16e9ac618a931c46b0b87d5d50e252bd994aa77: Wow! That's a serious find! Good luck in the lower digs.
textByHashes.4ffd44926b72d88ced035b66a48fde4c4d861b6c: Well, feel free to talk to me should you come across anything you can't figure out.
textByHashes.3968f13d57a58f93aa37d56cd16b73bfd4cf5622: Hello there! I heard all about your big find; well done!
